title: Bouri Group
description: ***.net ***.com/c/bouri-group/356964813 Established in 1976, Bouri Group is a prominent Egyptian enterprise specializing in the manufacturing, importing, and retail distribution of premium home essentials and electrical appliances. As a leading provider of energy-efficient household solutions, the company offers an extensive portfolio of trusted international brands across kitchenware, houseware, and personal care. Through its comprehensive retail network and modern digital platforms, Bouri consistently delivers high-quality, durable products designed to equip and enhance everyday living
